title: Bageshwari Overbridge Construction Starts
summary: Work commenced on a ₹90 crore railway overbridge to connect Gaya station with Ramshila.

title: Tilda Junction Modernization
summary: Upgradation work began at Tilda-Neora railway station under the Amrit Bharat Station Scheme.

title: Naya Raipur Metro Neo Project
summary: The central government approved the Detailed Project Report for Metro Neo connectivity between Raipur and Naya Raipur.

title: Raipur Skywalk Dismantling Reconsidered
summary: The state cabinet deferred the decision to dismantle the Raipur Skywalk, opting for a feasibility study for commercial reuse.

title: Chandni Chowk Underground Cabling
summary: Launch of a ₹160-crore project to shift 52.5 km of overhead electricity wires underground in the historic Chandni Chowk area.

title: Severe Cold Wave Conditions
summary: Morning temperatures plummeted to 3°C as a severe cold wave accompanied by dense fog disrupted life at Kartavya Path.

title: Missing Persons Data Surge
summary: Police data reported 807 persons missing in the first 15 days of 2026 in New Delhi district.

title: Electric Vehicle Fire Statistics
summary: Annual safety report for New Delhi indicated a trend of 9-10 fire-related EV accidents.

title: Above Normal Winter Heat
summary: Safdarjung observatory, located in the New Delhi sub-division, recorded markedly high temperatures.

title: Delhi Metro 394km Milestone
summary: DMRC milestone reported at Metro Bhawan, located within the New Delhi sub-division.

title: Preventable Disaster Toll Report
summary: Revenue department data for the New Delhi district revealed significant life loss due to civic lapses.

title: Community Policing Initiative Launch
summary: New community policing initiative launched in Saraswati Vihar to improve local safety and emergency response times.

title: Sangam Vihar Infrastructure Upgrade
summary: CM inaugurates ₹115 crore projects for road and sewerage networks in Sangam Vihar.

title: Holi Traffic Violations Surge

title: Waterborne Disease Counter-Drive
summary: The SMC Health Department intensified monitoring of diseases in the Udhna and Limbayat zones.

title: Family Dies in Flyover Fall
summary: A family of three died after their scooter hit a railing on the Chandrashekhar Azad flyover and plunged 70 feet in Adajan.

gu.title: ફ્લાયઓવર પરથી પટકાતા પરિવારનું મોત
gu.summary: અડાજણમાં ચંદ્રશેખર આઝાદ ફ્લાયઓવરની રેલિંગ સાથે સ્કૂટર અથડાતા અને 70 ફૂટ નીચે પટકાતા પરિવારના ત્રણ સભ્યોના મોત થયા છે।

hi.title: फ्लाईओवर से गिरकर परिवार की मौत
hi.summary: अडाजण में चंद्रशेखर आज़ाद फ्लाईओवर की रेलिंग से स्कूटर टकराने और 70 फीट नीचे गिरने से एक ही परिवार के तीन सदस्यों की मौत हो गई।

mr.title: फ्लाईओव्हरवरून पडून कुटुंबाचा मृत्यू
mr.summary: अडाजण येथील चंद्रशेखर आझाद फ्लाईओव्हरच्या रेलिंगला स्कूटर धडकून ७० फूट खाली कोसळल्याने एकाच कुटुंबातील तिघांचा मृत्यू झाला।

title: BRTS Shutdown for Uttarayan
summary: All BRTS bus services were suspended to prevent kite string accidents across multiple city corridors.

title: Diamond Traders Booked for Fraud
summary: The Gajera brothers were booked in a massive Rs 1,928 crore cheating and forgery case involving funds from Ring Road textile markets.

title: Workers Arrested After Plant Unrest
summary: Police arrested 40 workers at the AM/NS plant following an outbreak of unrest in Hazira.

gu.title: પ્લાન્ટમાં અશાંતિ બાદ કામદારોની ધરપકડ

hi.title: प्लांट में अशांति के बाद मजदूर गिरफ्तार
hi.summary: हजीरा स्थित AM/NS प्लांट में अशांति फैलने के बाद पुलिस ने 40 मजदूरों को गिरफ्तार किया।

mr.title: प्लांटमध्ये अशांतीनंतर कामगारांना अटक
mr.summary: हजीरा येथील AM/NS प्लांटमध्ये झालेल्या अशांतीनंतर पोलिसांनी 40 कामगारांना अटक केली।

title: HPV Vaccine Drive Launch Planned

title: Dense Fog - Massive Pile-up Advisory
summary: Visibility < 50m causing multiple vehicle collisions across Haryana highways, including Gurugram sectors.

title: ARI Spike - Winter Pollution Impact
summary: 2,293 acute respiratory illness emergencies recorded. 358 case increase over previous winter due to poor AQI.

title: New Bridge Over Cauvery in K.R. Nagara
summary: The state cabinet approved the construction of a new bridge across the Cauvery River connecting K.R. Nagara to Hole Narsipur.

title: Hunsur Forest Edge Patrols Increased
summary: Forest department intensified night patrols along the Hunsur-Nagarahole border after multiple tiger sightings reported.

title: Kabini River Desilting Project
summary: Authorities launched a desilting drive in the Kabini River near Nanjangud to prevent flooding during the upcoming monsoon.

title: Traffic Awareness Drive in Kuvempunagar
summary: City police conducted an awareness program in Kuvempunagar to reduce accidents at major intersections.

title: Hebbal Industrial Area Upgrade
summary: The Karnataka Industrial Area Development Board (KIADB) announced a ₹20 crore fund for drainage and road repairs in Hebbal.

title: Airport Infrastructure Stress Warning
summary: Authorities project 10 lakh additional flyers in 2026, leading to urgent calls for expanded space at Lohegaon Airport.

title: Talegaon Bridge Closure Alert
summary: A bridge between Talegaon and Dehu Road was closed for maintenance, causing local traffic diversions.

title: Outer Ring Road Work Progresses
summary: Major groundwork for the Pune Outer Ring Road has been completed in the Sangrun and Davaje segments.

title: High Speed Train Trials Conducted
summary: High-speed train trials were successfully conducted on the Daund-Kashti section of the Pune division.

title: Pune Road Fatalities Surge
summary: Police data reveals a crisis with 290 road deaths in the past year, primarily affecting pedestrians and bikers in Pune City.

title: Three Fatalities in Road Accidents
summary: Three people died in separate road accidents involving a PMPML bus and trucks in Aundh and Nagar Road.

title: Gas Tanker Overturns Near Tunnel
summary: A gas tanker overturned near Aadoshi tunnel, causing a 50km traffic jam on the Mumbai-Pune Expressway for 20 hours.

title: MHADA Lottery Results Declared
summary: Results for the Pune MHADA housing lottery were officially declared for thousands of affordable units.

title: Mula Mutha Riverfront Stretch Opened
summary: The Pune Municipal Corporation opened a 1.5 km rejuvenated stretch of the riverfront in Yerawada-Kalyani Nagar.

title: High Chikungunya Infection Rates
summary: Pune district logged the highest chikungunya infections and second-highest dengue cases in Maharashtra for the 2025 season.

title: Second Highest February Minimum Temp
summary: Shivajinagar recorded a minimum temperature of 19.2°C, the second-highest for February since 2015.

title: Fatal Crash Near Katraj Tunnel
summary: A truck driver died and several passengers were injured after a truck carrying iron pipes collided with a bus at Katraj Ghat.

title: Construction Stop Notices Issued
summary: PMC issued stop-work notices to 220 construction sites for failing to implement air pollution control measures across city areas.

title: Dump Site Fire Hospitalizes Five
summary: A massive fire at a garbage dump on the Mula-Mutha river bed led to the hospitalization of five students with breathing issues in Loni Kalbhor.

title: Propylene Tanker Overturns on Expressway
summary: An inflammable gas tanker overturned near Khopoli, resulting in a 33-hour traffic halt on the Mumbai-Pune Expressway.

title: Communal Tensions Erupt Tarana
summary: Clashes in Tarana led to a bus being torched and shops vandalized following an attack on a local individual.

title: Mahashivratri Crowd Management Operations
summary: Massive devotee turnout for Bhasma Aarti at Mahakaleshwar Temple required emergency crowd control and medical standby teams.

title: Billboard Collapse Kills One
summary: Gusty winds caused a large hoarding to collapse in Aiginia, killing a 38-year-old man taking shelter.

title: National Road Safety Month
summary: State government launched a month-long awareness campaign focusing on drunk driving and over-speeding enforcement district-wide.

title: Pedestrian Safety Walkathon Organized
summary: The Muskaan Foundation and Rajasthan Police held a walkathon to promote pedestrian-friendly infrastructure in Jaipur City Center.

title: Gudiyatham Ring Road Survey
summary: Government surveyors identified land for the proposed 15km ring road to bypass Gudiyatham town congestion.

title: Palar River Bed Restoration Drive
summary: Environmentalists and district administration organized a community drive to remove illegal encroachments from the Palar river bed.

title: Vellore CMC Hospital Expansion
summary: New specialty wing inaugurated at CMC Chittoor campus extension, primarily serving Vellore city patients.

title: Modern Primary School Inaugurated
summary: A new primary school with smart classroom facilities was opened in Alaudipur, benefiting 200 children.

title: Solar Streetlight Installation in Atwa
summary: As part of the Gram Jyoti Yojana, 50 solar streetlights were installed in Atwa village to improve nighttime safety.

title: Canal Cleaning Drive in Machhrehta
summary: The Irrigation Department accelerated the desilting of minor canals in Machhrehta ahead of the summer crop season.

title: Mega Health Camp in Hargaon
summary: Over 500 local residents received free medical screenings and medicines during a district health department drive in Hargaon.

title: Sadar Bazar Road Expansion
summary: Authorities initiated a major road widening project in Sadar Bazar to decongest the main market area of Sitapur.

title: Bandel Imambara Restoration Security
summary: CCTV surveillance increased around the heritage site of Bandel Imambara following recent vandalism attempts.

title: Singur Logistics Hub Construction
summary: Private developers broke ground on a massive cold storage and logistics hub near Singur on NH19.

title: Hooghly Riverfront Beautification
summary: Chinsurah municipality commenced the phase 2 of riverfront development aiming to create a new promenade.

title: Mild Tremors Felt District-Wide
summary: A 4.2 magnitude earthquake with epicenter in neighboring district triggered minor tremors in Chinsurah, Serampore and Singur.
